synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0926 Important: Oracle Linux 7 net-snmp security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0926

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0926.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 7 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
net-snmp-5.7.2-49.0.3.el7_9.4.x86_64.rpm
net-snmp-agent-libs-5.7.2-49.0.3.el7_9.4.i686.rpm
net-snmp-agent-libs-5.7.2-49.0.3.el7_9.4.x86_64.rpm
net-snmp-devel-5.7.2-49.0.3.el7_9.4.i686.rpm
net-snmp-devel-5.7.2-49.0.3.el7_9.4.x86_64.rpm
net-snmp-gui-5.7.2-49.0.3.el7_9.4.x86_64.rpm
net-snmp-libs-5.7.2-49.0.3.el7_9.4.i686.rpm
net-snmp-libs-5.7.2-49.0.3.el7_9.4.x86_64.rpm
net-snmp-perl-5.7.2-49.0.3.el7_9.4.x86_64.rpm
net-snmp-python-5.7.2-49.0.3.el7_9.4.x86_64.rpm
net-snmp-sysvinit-5.7.2-49.0.3.el7_9.4.x86_64.rpm
net-snmp-utils-5.7.2-49.0.3.el7_9.4.x86_64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol7/SRPMS-updates/net-snmp-5.7.2-49.0.3.el7_9.4.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-68615




Description of changes:

[1:5.7.2-49.0.3]
- Fix out of bound access [Orabug: 38873509][CVE-2025-68615]
